name: @truefoundry/tfy-hermes-agent
description: Standalone TrueFoundry Hermes agent deployment compiler and runtime

scripts.test: node --test controller/openai-adapter.test.mjs bin/compiler.test.mjs controller/session-continuity.test.mjs controller/slack-files.test.mjs controller/dispatch.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check controller/controller.mjs && node --check controller/dispatch.mjs && node --check controller/util.mjs && node --check executor/executor.mjs && node --check executor/run-turn.mjs && node --check executor/server.mjs && node --check executor/tokens.mjs && node --check bin/tfy-hermes-agent.mjs && node --check controller/openai-adapter.test.mjs && node --check bin/compiler.test.mjs && node --check controller/session-continuity.test.mjs && node --check controller/slack-files.test.mjs && node --check controller/dispatch.test.mjs && node --check controller/artifacts.mjs && node --check controller/slack-ingest.mjs && node --check scripts/mock-gateway.mjs && node --check scripts/local-smoke.mjs && npm test
scripts.local:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local logs -f controller executor
scripts.local:e2e: npm run local:up && npm run local:smoke && npm run local:down
